title: evolvulus villosus
intro: Evolvulus villosus, also known as hairy dwarf morning glory, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Evolvulus villosus include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and providing antioxidant protection. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
